subject: Randomize camel servlet name
commit_message:
Randomize camel servlet name

Randomize the camel servlet name so that integration tests can run in parallel.

Issue-ID: CLAMP-844
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: If45c6c8cea103e7353a7e3dc5b3edbb8429f2ef7
